is.one_liner: Evidence-backed provider ingress that normalizes external events into bounded Freeside observations
scope: Normalize versioned provider events into privacy-bounded Freeside observations
Disposition events as projected, ignored, quarantined, duplicate, or conflict
Publish source, coverage, and evidence artifacts for each provider contract
Expose provider-keyed adapters behind one typed ingestion boundary
Preserve medium-registry as a separate presentation compatibility surface

is_not: Does NOT claim production durability until a transactional IngestionStore passes conformance
Does NOT own provider credentials, Gateway sessions, webhooks, or transport lifecycle
Does NOT resolve identity or write activity, score, inventory, or storage state
Will NOT silently discard unknown, malformed, duplicate, or conflicting events
Refuses to fold presentation rendering contracts into provider-ingestion contracts

acvp_invariants.scope: Every decoded event reaches a stored disposition or a surfaced typed/defect failure
Tenant-scoped event identity makes re-delivery duplicate and payload drift conflict
The Discord admitted surface and adapter dispositions stay classification-complete
Envelopes, observations, dispositions, results, sources, coverage, and evidence decode
